# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: A sample service that send an SMS to a customer via SNS.
Parameters:
  TopicARNParam:
    Description: The ARN of the Topic to receive the message
    Type: String
    Default: ""
  VisibilityTimeoutSecParam:
      Description: The duration (in seconds) for which messages are visible in the queue before they must be updated with a visibility timeout period. Minimum 60s, Maximum 43200s (12hrs).
      Type: Number
      MinValue: "60"
      MaxValue:"43200"
Resources:
  QUEUENAME:
    Properties:
      QueueName:
        !Sub
        - queue
        - TopicARNParam: !If [IsTopic, "true", "false"]
        Value:
          Fn::Join:
          - ""
          - - "-topic-arn-"
            - TopicArnParam
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
  POLICIES_Q:
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QUEUENAME # Set the Queue ARN to Queue name
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:  ## set permissions for the queue. 
        - Effect : Allow
          Action   : 'sqs:*' 
          Principal: 'aws:'
          SourceArn:
            Fn::GetAtt: [ TopicPolicy , Arn]  ## get the topic arn from SNS policy. 
      Version   : "2012-10-17"  
  TOPIC_Q:
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSecParam  
      Attributes:
        MessageRetentionPeriod: '3600'
      QueueName: !Ref QUEUENAME
      TopicArn:
        Fn::GetAtt : [ Topic , Arn ] # Set the SNS topic arn for the queue
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
Outputs:
  MySQSArnParamOutput: ## Get the sqs ARN. 
    Value    : !GetAtt QUEUENAME . Arn   
    Description: The SQS ARN
  TopicPolicy:  # get the Topic policy.
    Value     : !Ref TOPIC_Q
    Description: Topic Policy
  Queuename   : 
    Value      :  !Ref QUEUENAME 
    Description: Queue name
